meaning: v. 精力充沛地开始做某事
example: He went at the task with great determination.
I don’t really go in for competitive sports.
Everyone has to go through challenges while growing up.

meaning: v. 从疾病或打击中恢复
example: It took her weeks to get over the illness.
News of his success soon got about.

meaning: v. 四处走动（尤指行动不便）
example: It is hard for him to get about without help.
Good communication makes for a better relationship.

meaning: v. 继续前进；取得进展（较少见）
example: Despite the difficulties, they made on with their work.
The child was called after his grandfather.
We are called on to take responsibility for our actions.
The situation calls for immediate action.
Many people called for social justice.
We called at the museum on our way home.
Attendance began to drop off after the first week.
I’ll drop you off at the station.
She gave away her old books to the library.
What happened to you last night?
The old building was pulled down.
Negative comments pulled her down.
The group decided to break away from old rules.
